title: How did the woman get help?

meanings.usage: 指飞机、汽车等猛烈撞击而损坏
指事故中交通工具的损坏
表示没有受到任何伤害
用于强调形容词或副词
指出于传递信息而做动作
指用脚重重地踩踏地面
指带旋转螺旋桨的航空器
指在灾难或事故中存活下来的人

examples.en: The plane flew off course due to the bad weather.
examples.zh: 由于恶劣天气，飞机偏离了航线。

examples.en: It happened in the middle of winter when it was very cold.
examples.zh: 事情发生在非常寒冷的隆冬时节。

examples.en: She turned a suitcase into a bed for the children.
examples.zh: 她把手提箱变成了孩子们的床。

phrases.phrase: keep as near as possible to

examples.en: The woman kept as near as possible to her children.
examples.zh: 那位妇女尽可能靠近她的孩子们。

examples.en: Early next morning, she heard planes passing overhead.
examples.zh: 第二天一大早，她听到飞机从头顶飞过。

examples.en: Planes passed overhead but no one saw her.
examples.zh: 飞机从头顶飞过，但没有人看到她。

examples.en: The pilot sent a message by radio to the nearest town.
examples.zh: 飞行员通过无线电向最近的城镇发送了消息。

examples.en: It was not long before a helicopter arrived.
examples.zh: 不久之后，一架直升机赶到了。

examples.en: Then she had an idea to stamp out letters in the snow.
examples.zh: 然后她想出了一个主意：在雪地上踩出字母。

examples.en: The helicopter came to rescue the survivors of the crash.
examples.zh: 直升机赶来营救坠机事故中的幸存者。

grammar.title: 一般过去时 (Past Simple Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某个特定时间发生的动作或存在的状态
grammar.usage: 用于叙述过去发生的事情，描述一系列按时间顺序发生的动作

examples.en: The plane crashed in the mountains.
She turned a suitcase into a bed.

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在发生的动作，常与过去进行时连用或用于设置故事背景

examples.en: She was turning a suitcase into a bed when it grew dark.
examples.zh: 天黑时她正在把手提箱变成床。

examples.en: The children were sleeping in the case.

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于叙述过去事件时，表示两个过去的动作中较早发生的那个

examples.en: When the pilot saw the signal, a message had already been sent.
examples.zh: 当飞行员看到信号时，消息已经被发出了。

examples.en: She had covered the children with clothes before it got cold.
examples.zh: 在天变冷之前她已经给孩子们盖上了衣服。

sentencePatterns.pattern: When + 过去时态, 主语 + 过去时态

original.en: When it grew dark, she turned a suitcase into a bed.
original.zh: 当夜幕降临时，她把手提箱变成了床。

imitations.en: When it started to rain, we went inside.
imitations.zh: 当开始下雨时，我们走进了室内。

imitations.en: When he arrived home, his wife was cooking dinner.
imitations.zh: 当他到家时，他的妻子正在做晚饭。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had + 过去分词 + before + 主语 + 过去时态

original.en: She had covered them with all the clothes she could find before it got cold.
original.zh: 在天变冷之前，她用尽所有能找到的衣服给孩子们盖上。

imitations.en: He had finished his homework before his father came back.
imitations.zh: 在他父亲回来之前，他已经完成了作业。

imitations.en: The pilot had sent a message before the helicopter arrived.
imitations.zh: 在直升机到达之前，飞行员已经发送了消息。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It is/was not long before + 主语 + 过去时态

original.en: It was not long before a helicopter arrived on the scene.
original.zh: 不久之后，一架直升机到达了现场。

imitations.en: It was not long before the doctor arrived.
It was not long before the train left the station.
imitations.zh: 不久之后火车就离开了车站。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + 动词 + the letters + '...' + in + 地点

original.en: She stamped out the letters 'SOS' in the snow.
original.zh: 她在雪地上踩出了'SOS'字母。

imitations.en: The children drew the word 'HELP' in the sand.
imitations.zh: 孩子们在沙地上画了'HELP'这个词。

imitations.en: He wrote the word 'SAVE' on the ground with a stick.
imitations.zh: 他用树枝在地上写了'SAVE'这个词。
